description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 3 times. When healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants all allies a shield that absorbs damage for [12 sec->7 sec]. While the shield lasts, the target’s ATK increases by [20%->25%], Healing Power by [50%->65%], and Status Resistance by [immunity to CC->600].
Deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6 times, then inflicts Blind for [6 sec->3.5 sec], and increases Magic DMG taken by 25% for 10 sec. This skill applies Critical Rate 500 higher.

Magic DMG taken is reduced by 15%. At the start of each battle or every [15 sec->14 sec], restores 15% of Max HP to the 1 allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF for [10 sec->7 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000], but the target count changes to 2.
Mana cost increases by [1->1000] and damage increases by 80%.
Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by [30%->40%] for the duration of Skill.

description.unified: [Blessings of Light] Increases the shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every sec for 4 sec.
[Heaven’s Vengeance] increases the target’s M.DMG taken by 20% for 10 sec and extends Blind duration by {0} sec.
Every 8 sec, heals the 4 allies with the lowest current HP by {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate of the 4 allies with the highest ATK by [300->200], and Critical DMG by {1}% for 8 sec.
